course_title: ELECTRONIC, OPTICAL, AND MAGNETIC PROPERTIES OF MATERIALS
description: Quantitative description of electronic, optical, and magnetic structure-property relationships of materials. Strategies for the development of new materials and introduction to applications of these materials.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (M S & E 350or351) and (PHYSICS 202,208,248, orE C E/​PHYSICS  235),  graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
